phase_1_preparation: Update Security Rules to support Organization-based access
Add 'organizationId' field to 'events' and 'registrations' (keep 'organizerId' for fallback)
phase_2_data_migration: Run script to convert every user with accountType=='Empresa' into an Organization
Create OrganizationMember entry for each migrated user as 'owner'
Transfer 'plan' and 'bankDetails' from User to Organization
Update all existing Events: set organizationId = old user organizerId
phase_3_frontend_refactor: Update Dashboard sidebar to allow switching organizations
Refactor Event Creation flow to select an Organization
Update Public Profile to handle Organization usernames (/org_username)
Refactor Checkout to pay to the Organization's Stripe Connect ID

compatibility_layer.usernames: Maintain unique index for both Users and Organizations to prevent URL collisions
compatibility_layer.fallback: Keep user.accountType legacy field during transition to avoid breaking existing sessions
compatibility_layer.urls: Redirect /[username] based on metadata: check if username is User or Organization

checklist_tecnico: Validar unicidade global de usernames entre users e orgs
Implementar hook useOrganization() para contexto do dashboard
Refatorar financial-utils para ler config da Org
Atualizar regras de Firestore para checar /organization_members/{userId}
